goals: Store information about a specific flag or coat of arms they're studying
Search for previously stored information about a particular symbol or design element
Review all stored memories to see what has been captured so far
Remove an outdated or incorrect memory entry

user_agent_config.personality: Detail-oriented and methodical. Prefers systematic organization of research materials and values accuracy in historical symbolism.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Expert in post-Soviet flags and heraldry but unfamiliar with memory management tools or APIs. Understands basic search and storage concepts but needs to learn how to effectively use the memory system.

end_condition: The user has successfully added relevant research notes, retrieved specific stored information, reviewed their memory collection, and cleaned up any unwanted entries.
